issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
Installer is downloaded via curl without checksum verification.
Credentials are passed as environment variables in the command line, potentially exposing them to other processes.

scenarios.name: Login flow with conditional notification permission and secret credentials
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes a YAML flow with appId, launchApp, tapOn/inputText, uses runFlow with a when: visible: conditional to dismiss the permission prompt, and injects ${EMAIL}/${PASSWORD} env vars passed via EMAIL=... PASSWORD=... maestro test; baseline writes generic Appium/Detox code that doesn't match Maestro's YAML schema.

scenarios.name: GitHub Actions CI running flows on an Android emulator
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the curl get.maestro.mobile.dev installer, reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner@v2 with api-level 34, adb install, and runs ~/.maestro/bin/maestro test flows/ on a directory of YAML flows; baseline produces a generic mobile-test CI yaml without Maestro's install path or directory test runner.
